character.name: zari
character.prompt: Young female student archer, white shirt under a purple hoodie, dark shorts with leggings, sneakers. Hair in a high ponytail, wide enthusiastic brown eyes, big smile. Holds a handmade wooden bow, pencil case worn as a quiver on her back. Pixel art style, thick black outlines, clean cel-shading, saturated colors, semi-realistic proportions, detailed face with visible eyes, dark shadows on clothing folds, professional sprite quality.
